source: 15-minute pull history only plus current moneyline/run-line book data

coverage.policy: MLB HOT pull history should start at 1:00 AM ET and continue every 15 minutes.

rows.matchup: San Francisco Giants at Arizona Diamondbacks
New York Mets at Toronto Blue Jays
San Diego Padres at Chicago Cubs
Washington Nationals at Boston Red Sox
Los Angeles Angels at Seattle Mariners
Detroit Tigers at New York Yankees
Chicago White Sox at Baltimore Orioles

policy: Every MLB game with convertible 15-minute pull data must receive an individual game-winner score. Parlays must be built from these scored rows, not from a separate hidden scoring path.
